# Marketing AI Lab

Marketing AI Lab is an AI-powered campaign and marketing strategy generator. It allows startup founders, marketing managers, agencies, and freelancers to turn a simple brief into a comprehensive marketing strategy deck including:

- Executive Campaign Summary
- Website Insights (if applicable)
- Buyer Persona Profile
- Omnichannel Channel Strategy
- Budget Allocation
- Performance Forecasts
- Priorities and Action Plan
- Next Steps / Implementation Timeline

## Links
- [Homepage](https://marketingailab.app/)
